From interface com.autolink.manager.audio.AudioManager.IAudioVolumeListener
abstract void onGroupMuteChanged(int groupId, boolean mute, int flags)
This is called whenever a group mute state is changed.
abstract void onGroupVolumeChanged(int groupId, int volume, int flags)
This is called whenever a group volume is changed.
